message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.pct_change (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.pct_change:

- pct_change_default (periods=1)
- pct_change_periods_2
- pct_change_with_zero_baseline (verifies infinity emission)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesPctChange was already wired in
FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-b8a01]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
